name: codex-colab-bridge
description: Use a Google Colab runtime from Codex through a Cloudflare-backed MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Use Colab GPU runtimes from Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a Google Colab runtime through a Cloudflare Worker and local MCP server. This enables remote code execution inside a Colab VM you control; run setup only with Workers, runners, and tokens you trust.
defaultPrompt: Run a short command in Colab
